heroSubtitle: Strengthening!! disaster risk management governance by improving how authorities, sectoral actors, businesses and communities coordinate before and during crises.
aboutTeaser: TOGETHER is a Horizon Europe research project that addresses fragmented disaster risk governance through multi-level coordination. We develop a toolkit combining interoperability frameworks, an AI-powered system, and governance solutions — tested across Innovation Hubs in Greece, Norway, Spain, Portugal, and Türkiye.

components.title: Interoperability Frameworks
components.description: FAIR data frameworks enabling secure, seamless information exchange across institutions and sectors.

components.title: Multi-Tool AI System
components.description: An AI-powered system generating scientific insights and situational awareness to support decision-making during crises.

components.title: Governance Solutions
components.description: Novel public-private-civil partnership models that implement polycentric governance for disaster risk management.
